Uses of Class
org.bytedeco.cuda.nvcomp.nvcompCRC32Spec_t

    Package Description
    org.bytedeco.cuda.global  
    org.bytedeco.cuda.nvcomp  

    • Uses of nvcompCRC32Spec_t in org.bytedeco.cuda.global

      Methods in org.bytedeco.cuda.global that return nvcompCRC32Spec_t 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_AUTOSAR()
      \brief CRC-32/AUTOSAR model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_BZIP2()
      \brief CRC-32/BZIP2 (aka CRC-32/AAL-5) model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_C()
      \brief CRC32-C (aka CRC-32/ISCSI) model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_CD_ROM_EDC()
      \brief CRC-32/CD-ROM-EDC model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_D()
      \brief CRC32-D (aka CRC-32/BASE91-D) model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_JAMCRC()
      \brief CRC-32/JAMCRC model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_MEF()
      \brief CRC-32/MEF model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_MPEG_2()
      \brief CRC-32/MPEG-2 model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_POSIX()
      \brief CRC-32/POSIX (aka CRC-32/CKSUM) model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_Q()
      \brief CRC32-Q (aka CRC-32/AIXM) model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32_XFER()
      \brief CRC-32/XFER model preset.
      static nvcompCRC32Spec_t nvcomp.nvcompCRC32()
      \brief Standard CRC32 (aka CRC-32/PKZIP) model preset.
      Methods in org.bytedeco.cuda.global with parameters of type nvcompCRC32Spec_t 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static int nvcomp.nvcompBatchedCRC32SearchConf(PointerPointer device_input_chunk_ptrs, SizeTPointer device_input_chunk_bytes, long num_chunks, IntPointer device_crc32_ptr, nvcompCRC32Spec_t spec, nvcompCRC32KernelConf_t kernel_conf, CUstream_st stream)
      \brief Explicitly search for the optimal CRC32 kernel configuration by benchmarking.
      static int nvcomp.nvcompBatchedCRC32SearchConf(Pointer device_input_chunk_ptrs, SizeTPointer device_input_chunk_bytes, long num_chunks, int[] device_crc32_ptr, nvcompCRC32Spec_t spec, nvcompCRC32KernelConf_t kernel_conf, CUstream_st stream) 
      static int nvcomp.nvcompBatchedCRC32SearchConf(Pointer device_input_chunk_ptrs, SizeTPointer device_input_chunk_bytes, long num_chunks, IntBuffer device_crc32_ptr, nvcompCRC32Spec_t spec, nvcompCRC32KernelConf_t kernel_conf, CUstream_st stream) 
      static int nvcomp.nvcompBatchedCRC32SearchConf(Pointer device_input_chunk_ptrs, SizeTPointer device_input_chunk_bytes, long num_chunks, IntPointer device_crc32_ptr, nvcompCRC32Spec_t spec, nvcompCRC32KernelConf_t kernel_conf, CUstream_st stream)
